items.title: US launches new strikes on Iran, targeting missile sites and boats
items.summary: US Central Command says the strikes were taken in "self-defense". It comes as senior Iranian negotiators arrive in Qatar for talks to end the war.

items.title: Deal with US not imminent, Iran says
items.summary: The US secretary of state earlier said that an agreement could possibly come on Monday.

items.title: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
items.summary: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 北韓又射了！朝黃海方向發射不明飛行物
